zh.lifeSummary: 當Countessa Eva Menteith於1168年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith25歲，母親Agatha Gilchrist17歲。她和Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox至少有15個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1241年在英國蘇格蘭享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countessa Eva Menteith于1168年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith25岁，母亲Agatha Gilchrist17岁。她和Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox至少有15个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1241年在英国苏格兰享年73岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Countessa Eva Menteith was born in 1168, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, was 25 and her mother, Agatha Gilchrist, was 17. She had at least 15 sons and 2 daughters with Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox. She died in 1241, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countessa Eva Menteith est née en 1168, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agatha Gilchrist, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 15 fils et 2 filles avec Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox. Elle est décédée en 1241, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countessa Eva Menteith 1168 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith 25 und ihre Mutter Agatha Gilchrist 17. Sie hatte mit Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox mindestens 15 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1241 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countessa Eva Menteith è nata il nel 1168 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agatha Gilchrist, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 15 figli e 2 figlie con Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox. Morì nel 1241, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Countessa Eva Menteithが1168年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteithは25歳，母Agatha Gilchristは17歳であった。彼女はAlwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennoxとの間に少なくとも15人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1241年にイギリススコットランドで73歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countessa Eva Menteith(이)가 1168년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha Gilchrist(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Menteith, Perthshire, Scotland: Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countessa Eva Menteith nasceu em 1168, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agatha Gilchrist, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 15 filhos e 2 filhas com Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox. Ela faleceu em 1241, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countessa Eva Menteith родилась в 1168 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha Gilchrist, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 2 дочери от Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox. Она умерла в 1241 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countessa Eva Menteith nació en 1168, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agatha Gilchrist, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 15 hijos y 2 hijas con Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox. Murió en 1241, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
